title: ctxloom pr-bot per-repo configuration
description: Schema for `.ctxloom.yml` files placed at the root of any repository where the ctxloom pr-bot is installed. Editors that support YAML language services (VS Code with the YAML extension, JetBrains IDEs) can validate against this schema. See apps/pr-bot/src/config.ts for the source-of-truth Zod schema; this JSON Schema mirrors it.

risk_threshold.description: Minimum risk score (0-1) that triggers inline comments or blocks the check run.

inline_comments.description: Post inline review comments on high-risk diff hunks.

suggested_reviewers.description: Suggest reviewers based on ownership of high-risk modules.

check_run.description: Create a GitHub Check Run that can block merge when the overall PR risk exceeds risk_threshold.

excluded_paths.description: Glob patterns for files the bot should never comment on (e.g. `**/*.lock`, `docs/**`).

max_inline_per_pr.description: Maximum number of inline comments to post on a single PR. Hard cap is 50.
